objective: Find simple explainable 1h candidates with high Pyth-proxy win rate using no-leak synthetic active candles.
outcomeSource: Pyth spot 1h candle direction; local Polymarket 1h resolutions are not populated yet.

topByFamily.description: Buy/sell at a range edge only after the active partial candle has already started moving away from that edge.
Buy low and sell high at the outer 10% of the 20-bar range.
Fade the partially formed previous-hour candle visible at decision time.
Fade the prev closed-candle trend direction.
Fade the average active move of the other traded crypto assets.
Buy low/sell high using range position, SMA20 side, and Bollinger midline side.
Follow the partially formed previous-hour candle visible at decision time.
Fade the asset's active move when BTC and the broader basket are not strongly confirming it.
Follow the prior3 closed-candle trend direction.
Follow price at the outer 40% of the 50-bar range.
Follow active momentum, recent closed trend, moving averages, and RSI when they mostly agree.
